meta.title: Project CHAGRA-NET
meta.description: Solarpunk ecotourism platform connecting digital nomads, indigenous communities, and regenerative Amazon development across Colombia and Brazil.

hero.title: Project CHAGRA-NET
hero.subtitle: A solarpunk living corridor for ethical nomadism, indigenous collaboration, and regenerative innovation across Leticia, La Pedrera, Manaus, and Belem. Traditional and Indigenous Communities (Biodiversity Agreements) & How Colombia & Brazil have been empowered into making this.

why.title: Why this matters now
points: Build real jobs with and for indigenous communities through co-owned projects.
Turn reliable connectivity into long-stay opportunities for mission-driven residents.
Apply biomimicry and chagra principles to resilient, local-first development.

items.name: Leticia, Colombia
items.focus: Cross-border gateway for regenerative tourism, education, and startup pilots.

items.name: La Pedrera, Colombia
items.focus: Low-impact remote innovation hub tied to biodiversity stewardship.

items.name: Manaus, Brazil
items.focus: Scale point for logistics, digital infrastructure, and impact partnerships.

items.name: Belem do Para, Brazil
items.focus: Atlantic connector for climate innovation, culture, and market access.

roadmap.title: Interactive Roadmap
roadmap.instructions: Hover or focus a city point to view local opportunities and phased projects.

leticia.challenge: Bridge seasonal tourism with stable income for families and young creators.
leticia.opportunity: Pilot nomad residency circuits with local guide guilds and digital learning labs.

la_pedrera.challenge: Improve access to connectivity and durable income without ecological pressure.
la_pedrera.opportunity: Deploy mesh-ready micro-connectivity and community-led conservation work.

manaus.challenge: Connect innovation ecosystems with forest-positive projects in frontier towns.
manaus.opportunity: Scale training, IoT monitoring, and tokenized impact verification systems.

belem.challenge: Translate Amazon value chains into fair, global visibility and commercial access.
belem.opportunity: Launch bio-economy marketplace channels and climate storytelling labs.

ideas.title: Idea Bank
ideas.subtitle: A living portfolio of projects that combine bio-economy, AI, IoT, Web3, and human-centered interfaces.

chagra.title: Biomimicry x Chagra Framework
chagra.body: The indigenous chagra teaches diversity, cyclical productivity, and care over extraction. CHAGRA-NET translates these principles into digital and physical systems: mixed-value ecosystems, shared governance, and regeneration as a metric of success.

cta.title: Build the Amazon solarpunk corridor together
cta.body: We are opening collaborations for community organizations, residents, research institutions, and mission-aligned partners.
